name: Direct Execution Interposition
description: Tracing/observation mechanisms that change the code path itself: patch a site, swap in a trap, or reserve a place where control can be diverted later. Bytecode opcode patching, function-entry NOPs, USDT probes, kprobes, and compiler-inserted patchable sleds all sit here. Contrast with cooperative safepoints (the runtime arranges a handoff at safe points without trapping) and hardware tracing (CPU facilities capture data without software cooperation).
